description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 7th; Slot shoulders; Price 2,800 gp; Weight 5 lbs. If you worship the associated deity or a goblin barghest hero once per day you can polymorph into a wolf or a wolf-goblin hybrid for up to 7 minutes (the hybrid form resembles a barghestâs natural form but has the same statistics as a wolf).
